## TRM1.5. Vertical flight efficiency of the climb (PI#8)

Compared to the overall RP4 average value (34.8 seconds per flight), average times flown level during climb are on average 26.3 seconds per flight lower in Norway. The highest average time flown level during climb happens at Trondheim/Værnes (ENVA) (9.4 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Stavanger/Sola (ENZV) (7.3 seconds per flight).
